# CWE-312 — Cleartext Storage of Sensitive Information (vulnerable)
lang: go
file: CWE-312-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"gorm.io/gorm"
)

type Patient struct {
	ID  uint
	SSN string
}

// Vulnerable: persists government id in plaintext column.
func StorePatient(c *gin.Context, db *gorm.DB) {
	rec := Patient{SSN: c.PostForm("ssn")}
	db.Create(&rec)
	c.JSON(201, gin.H{"id": rec.ID})
}
